name: three
when_to_use: For any scene requiring 3D rendering: 3D objects, 3D data visualization, 3D text, product showcases, spatial animations, or immersive 3D environments
import_instructions: import { ThreeCanvas } from '@remotion/three'; import { useCurrentFrame } from 'remotion'; import * as THREE from 'three';
forbidden_patterns: Do NOT use <Canvas> from @react-three/fiber — use <ThreeCanvas> from @remotion/three
Do NOT use useFrame() from R3F — use useCurrentFrame() from Remotion for deterministic rendering
MUST pass width and height props to ThreeCanvas
remotion_integration_notes: ThreeCanvas replaces the regular React Three Fiber Canvas. It ensures frame-perfect 3D rendering. All animation must be driven by useCurrentFrame(), not useFrame().
